entries.title: Rapid7 Observed Exploitation of PAN-OS GlobalProtect Authentication Bypass Vulnerability (CVE-2026-0257)
entries.summary: Overview On May 13, 2026, Palo Alto Networks published a security advisory for CVE-2026-0257, a medium severity authentication bypass affecting PAN-OS and Prisma Access when a specific configuration is present. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability allows a remote unauthenticated attacker to successfully establish a VPN connection through the GlobalProtect gateway of an affected appliance.

entries.title: How We Bypassed an Axios Security Patch (CVE-2026–42043): The 16-Million IP Loophole
entries.summary: When a patch for a critical vulnerability drops in a library downloaded over 500 million times a week, you expect it to be bulletproof. Developers quickly update their package.json, deploy to production, and sleep peacefully, assuming their internal services are safe again. But what if the patch only fixed the symptom, leaving the root cause wide open? Recently, my co-researcher Amol (@IAMoloffici

entries.title: Making AI chatbots helpful weakens their ability to simulate human behavior, large-scale study finds
entries.summary: A large-scale study covering 208,000 participants and 26 million responses shows that the very training that turns language models into helpful chatbots weakens their ability to replicate human behavior. Until now, researchers had to master every step themselves, from framing problems to verifying results. Tao sees "industrial mathematics" emerging: large AI-supported teams instead of lone geniuses, with humans staying indispensable for "inspired guesses." The article Terence Ta

entries.title: Cheap Is a Hardware Strategy
entries.summary: Google led I/O 2026 with a cheap, fast Gemini Flash instead of a frontier behemoth, and everyone read it as conceding the top of the market. Wrong read. Cheap isn't a model strategy, it's a silicon strategy. Google owns every layer from the TPU to the search box, which is why it can give intelligence away while its rivals rent the compute to compete with it, some of them for $40 billion.

entries.title: Microcode inside the Intel 8087 floating-point chip: register exchange
entries.summary: In 1980, Intel introduced the 8087 floating-point chip, a co-processor that made floating-point operations up to 100 times faster. This chip was highly influential, and today most processors use the floating-point standard introduced by the 8087. The 8087 uses complicated algorithms to accurately compute functions such as square roots, tangents, and exponentials. These algorithms are implemented i

entries.title: How to Estimate Windows Drive Compression
entries.summary: Learn to estimate Windows drive compression effectively by considering factors like file types and system speed. For example, compressing a 10 GB folder can take minutes, so for a 500 GB drive, plan for hours. Use `compact.exe /c /s`, check properties, and monitor with Task Manager.

entries.title: 构建检测基础：第三部分 - PowerShell 与脚本日志的三大支柱
entries.summary: 围绕 Module Logging、Script Block Logging 与 Transcription 三大支柱，讲解 PowerShell 日志 ( 4103 / 4104 ) 的启用方式与价值，辅以混淆穿透实例、PowerShell 7 双日志通道避坑、Transcription 共享权限基线，以及与 4624 / 4688 关联追溯的实战流程。

entries.title: 构建检测基础：第四部分 - Sysmon
entries.summary: 本文介绍 Sysmon 如何弥补 Windows 原生日志的盲区，涵盖核心事件类型（进程创建、网络连接、LSASS 访问、注册表操作等）、生产级配置示例及调优理念，是构建完整端点检测遥测基础的关键一节。

entries.title: 构建检测基础：第一部分 - 单一数据源之困
entries.summary: 从一起 CACTUS 勒索软件事件出发，论证只依赖 EDR 的安全遥测体系存在致命盲区，并以 MITRE ATT&CK 覆盖数据与 LogonID 关联为线索，提出构建独立于厂商、可层层互补的 Windows 原生日志、PowerShell 与 Sysmon 检测基础。

entries.title: 构建检测基础：第二部分 - Windows 安全事件的取证骨架
entries.summary: 从 Advanced Audit Policy 入手，系统讲解登录 ( 4624 / 4634 / 4647 ) 与进程创建 ( 4688 ) 等关键 Windows 安全事件的启用方式，辅以 LogonID 关联实战、命令行日志开关以及一份可直接套用的 auditpol 基线配置。
